query:
-- Check how many of the ryan_leak projects have at least 1 send_ready contact
-- (if they do, they could appear in the digest without the lane filter)
SELECT 'ryan_bess_pal_pumps_with_sr' as check_name, COUNT(*) as count
FROM (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  WHERE p.suppressed = 0
    AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
    AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
    AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
    AND p.productLane IN ('bess','pal','pumps')
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING COUNT(c.id) >= 1
) t

UNION ALL

SELECT 'daniel_bess_pal_pumps_with_sr', COUNT(*)
FROM (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  WHERE p.suppressed = 0
    AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
    AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
    AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
    AND p.productLane IN ('bess','pal','pumps')
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING COUNT(c.id) >= 1
) t;
